name: Chocolate Bavarian Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 package devil's food cake mix without pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and bake the cake according to package directions using two 9-inch cake pans.
2. Cool in pans for 15 minutes; remove from pans and cool completely on a wire rack.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat together cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and salt until fluffy.
4. Fold in whipped cream.
5. Split each cake into two horizontal layers. Place one layer on a serving plate.
6. Spread with a quarter of the cream mixture.
7. Sprinkle with 1/4 of the chocolate.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
